sensors.title: Energy meters (kWh)
sensors.description: Select the sensors that track cumulative energy flow (kWh). These are your P1/smart meter counters and solar production meter.

data.consumption_sensor: Home consumption meter (kWh) — leave empty to auto-calculate

prices.title: Energy prices
prices.description: Set import/export prices and net-metering (saldering) rules. Under FULL saldering, export is effectively valued at import price. Under PHASE_OUT / NONE, the export price below is your actual feed-in tariff.

data.export_price_entity: Feed-in tariff / teruglevertarief (input_number entity) — your actual sell price. For FULL saldering this is unused, but for PHASE_OUT / NONE it determines post-netting revenue.

providers.title: Provider comparison (optional)
providers.description:
Optionally configure energy provider price comparison. Leave empty to skip provider comparison.

Create a free Enever token at [enever.nl/token-aanmaken](https://enever.nl/token-aanmaken/).

battery.title: Battery parameters
battery.description: Define the battery model and capacity to simulate.

data.battery_price_eur: Total battery price (€) — e.g. 1800 for a 15kWh DIY battery

sim_period.title: Simulation period
sim_period.description: Choose the historical period used to run the simulation.

results.title: Review results
results.description: Review your settings before creating the entry.

error.invalid_sensor: The selected sensor does not exist or has no statistics data.
error.no_statistics_data: No statistics data found for the selected period.
error.invalid_capacity: Capacity must be greater than zero.
error.invalid_efficiency: Round-trip efficiency must be between 1 and 100 percent.
error.invalid_date_range: End date must be after start date.
error.simulation_failed: The simulation could not be completed with the provided settings.

abort.already_configured: This battery ROI configuration already exists.
abort.no_sensors_available: No compatible energy sensors were found in this Home Assistant instance.

sensors.description: Update the sensors that track cumulative energy flow (kWh).

data.consumption_sensor: Home consumption meter (kWh) — leave empty to auto-calculate

prices.title: Energy prices
prices.description: Update buy/sell prices and net-metering (saldering) scenario. Under FULL saldering, export is valued at import price. Under PHASE_OUT / NONE, the export price is your actual feed-in tariff.

data.export_price_entity: Feed-in tariff / teruglevertarief (input_number entity) — your actual sell price. For FULL saldering this is unused, but for PHASE_OUT / NONE it determines post-netting revenue.

providers.title: Provider comparison (optional)
providers.description:
Update provider price comparison settings.

Create a free Enever token at [enever.nl/token-aanmaken](https://enever.nl/token-aanmaken/).

battery.description: Update the battery model and capacity to simulate.

data.battery_price_eur: Total battery price (€) — e.g. 1800 for a 15kWh DIY battery

sim_period.title: Simulation period
sim_period.description: Update the historical period used to run the simulation.

results.title: Review results
results.description: Review the recalculated ROI before saving.

error.invalid_sensor: The selected sensor does not exist or has no statistics data.
error.no_statistics_data: No statistics data found for the selected period.
error.invalid_capacity: Capacity must be greater than zero.
error.invalid_efficiency: Round-trip efficiency must be between 1 and 100 percent.
error.invalid_date_range: End date must be after start date.
